docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $550.23 FILED BY LESH, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT BAYLOCQ, DENISE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 25.00 - SERVED DEC-23-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAYLOCQ, DENISE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE QUEENA HO FILED BY LESH, KEVIN BAYLOCQ, DENISE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-13-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-13-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS NOT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LESH, KEVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAYLOCQ, DENISE $550.23 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $605.23 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2013 ORDERED DESTROYED
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850. (JUDGMENT ENTERED:FEB-13-2013) FILED BY DEFENDANT BAYLOCQ, DENISE
ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850. REQUEST GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. (JUDGMENT ENTERED ON: FEB-13-2013).
